manipulated_prompt_obj.content:
You are playing a text adventure game. I will describe what you can perceive in the game. You write the single action you want to take in the game starting with >. Only reply with an action.
For example:
> open cupboard

You can have up to two objects in your inventory at the same time.

Your goal for this game is: Put the apple in the freezer, the plate on the side table and the mop on the shelf.

Once you have achieved your goal, write "> done" to end the game.

You are in a living room now. There are a couch, a book, a chair and a table. The book is on the table. There are passages to a bedroom and a kitchen here.

> go to kitchen

The orange is in the refrigerator. The apple is in the refrigerator. The banana is in the refrigerator. The cupboard is closed. The peach is in the refrigerator. There are passages to a hallway, a pantry and a living room here.
